title: Dual-write: change-tracked entity with a business key ready for a Dataverse map
instruction: In the sandbox model, prepare an entity for dual-write. Ground it first with get_knowledge(topic="dual-write"). SCOPE LIMIT: the dual-write map itself is authored in the dual-write UI and is NOT an AOT element - out of scope. Create: (1) a table DemoSyncCustomer (label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote, table group Main) with fields CustomerCode (String, EDT Num, mandatory) and Name (String, EDT Name), the table's ModifiedDateTime property enabled, and a unique alternate-key index SyncCustomerIdx on CustomerCode; (2) a data entity DemoSyncCustomerEntity over it with EntityCategory=Master, public field names, CustomerCode as the natural business key (a stable alternate key - RecId as the key FAILS this case, because dual-write matches on business keys), IsPublic=Yes and change tracking enabled on the entity so incremental sync works. Both objects must build with zero BP errors.
